project_name: STMP Agri - Premium Corporate Website & Admin Dashboard

typography.description: Outfit offers an authoritative, high-end geometric structure suitable for an international B2B logistics/agri brand. Manrope provides crisp legibility for complex data in the dashboard and dense paragraphs.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-bold tracking-tight leading-none text-stmp-dark

primary.name: Vert Foncé
primary.usage: Brand core, main CTAs, headers, trusting elements

secondary.name: Vert Olive
secondary.usage: Growth indicators, secondary buttons, hover states for primary

tertiary.name: Vert Clair
tertiary.usage: Innovation accents, badges, highlights, subtle backgrounds (at 10% opacity)

accent.name: Jaune Doré
accent.usage: Energy, success metrics, alerts, 'Demander un devis' special highlights

visual_enhancers.graphic_device: The 'parcelles agricoles + soleil' (farm plots + sun) motif must be used subtly. Use it as a watermark (5-10% opacity) in the background of key sections, as a stylized SVG separator between sections, and integrated into premium vector icons.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Glassmorphism (The 'Crystal' Variant) for the sticky header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 or bg-[#0B110D]/80). Solid clean surfaces for dashboard and product cards.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use crisp 1px borders (border-gray-200 dark:border-[#1E3024]) for a premium, structured 'Swiss' feel. Avoid muddy drop shadows; use sharp, intentional shadows or no shadows with borders.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Interactive elements must lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase border/shadow contrast. ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for marketing page sections. Bento grid layouts (gap-8) for 'Nos métiers' and feature highlights.
layouts.hero_section: Immersive full-screen (min-h-[90vh]). Background image with bg-black/50 overlay to ensure text contrast. Big Outfit headline, bright Jaune Doré accent button. Parcelles + soleil motif animating subtly.
layouts.dashboard: High-density grid (gap-4). Sidebar navigation. Clean, functional Shadcn UI tables and forms. Sharp edges or max 8px border-radius.
layouts.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-8 for standard content. Edge-to-edge for specific gallery or hero elements.

components.buttons: Slightly rounded (rounded-md) for premium feel. Primary: bg-[#0E7A3A] text-white hover:bg-[#0B632F]. Accent (Quote): bg-[#F2D400] text-[#1F2937] hover:bg-[#D9BE00] font-bold. Always add focus rings.
components.cards: 1px subtle border. Internal padding p-8. Image at top or side with sharp crop.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard but styled with brand focus rings (focus:ring-[#0E7A3A]). Clean external labels. Use interactive calendar for date pickers.
components.navigation: Sticky glass header. Desktop: Full links + CTA. Mobile: Hamburger menu. Footer: Rich, dark (#1F2937) with Vert Clair text accents, huge logo.
components.toast: Use sonner for success/error notifications (Quote sent, etc).

motion.page_transitions: Framer Motion for soft fade-in and slide-up of sections as they scroll into view (staggered children).
motion.micro_interactions: Button hover fill expansion, subtle scale on card hover, smooth accordion expansions for FAQ/Products.
motion.parallax: Use on Hero background and large divider images.

media.icons: Use lucide-react. Ensure to map agriculture, truck, container, leaf, and shield icons for services.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on #0E7A3A meets 4.5:1 ratio. Darken overlay on hero images if needed.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-quote', data-testid='contact-form-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic 'Inter' or 'Roboto'. Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts.
Implement the hybrid fullstack app: React Router for public marketing pages and /admin for the back-office dashboard.
Build a custom floating WhatsApp button fixed at the bottom right.
Use Framer Motion for section-level scroll reveals.
Ensure 'Nos métiers' uses an asymmetrical or bento-style grid to break monotonous layouts.
Implement the 'Demande de devis' intelligent form with Shadcn components (dropdowns, interactive date picker, checkboxes).
Dashboard should be strictly utilitarian but styled with the STMP brand colors (anthracite bg for sidebar, green accents).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
NEVER use placeholder images; use the provided image URLs.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters for sticky headers.
Always use data-testid for key elements.
